post.caption:
🧠 Pro tip: Don't just ask Claude for answers

Ask it to show you HOW it thinks through problems. You'll get better results AND level up your own thinking.

#ClaudeAI #AITips #ProductivityHacks #ThinkingSkills

story_data.tip_text: Ask Claude to explain its reasoning process step-by-step
story_data.subtext: You'll get more accurate answers and learn how to think through problems yourself.
